description: Vertical, portrait-orientation quote graphic. The background is a color photograph of two people standing close together and smiling at each other, framed from below against the steel girders of an industrial bridge or dock structure under a hazy sky. On the left is a woman with long dark brown hair wearing a light blue blazer; on the right is an older white man with grey hair and a grey goatee wearing a light blue collared work shirt bearing a small red embroidered patch on the chest. The lower two-thirds of the image fades into a deep navy-blue gradient overlay. A small circular medallion with stylized opening quotation marks sits centered above the quote. The quote, in white italic serif type, reads: 'Thanks to President Trump, the Gulf of America is going to survive. His policies have our' followed by the words 'COMPLETE SUPPORT!' in very large bold white serif all-caps. At the bottom, attribution in white reads 'ACY' (bold caps) over 'Louisiana Shrimper' (italic). Faint government seal watermarks are in the dark lower background.
notable_text: 'Thanks to President Trump, the Gulf of America is going to survive. His policies have our COMPLETE SUPPORT!' - ACY, Louisiana Shrimper
